Package neqsim.process.research

Class ProcessResearchSpec

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.research.ProcessResearchSpec
public class ProcessResearchSpec extends Object
Input specification for a process research run.

The specification describes feed composition, desired products, allowed unit operations, reaction options, candidate-count limits, and optimization variables. It is intentionally declarative so callers can generate the same process candidates from Java, Python, notebooks, or web APIs.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    ProcessResearchSpec.Builder
    Builder for ProcessResearchSpec.
    static class 
    ProcessResearchSpec.DecisionVariable
    Continuous decision variable for per-candidate optimization.
    static class 
    ProcessResearchSpec.EconomicAssumptions
    Economic and emissions assumptions for synthesis ranking.
    static enum 
    ProcessResearchSpec.Objective
    Objective used by the default candidate ranker.
    static class 
    ProcessResearchSpec.ProductTarget
    Product target used for candidate scoring.
    static class 
    ProcessResearchSpec.RobustnessScenario
    Robustness scenario for feed-condition sensitivity checks.
    static class 
    ProcessResearchSpec.ScoringWeights
    Weights used to collapse process synthesis metrics into a ranking score.
    static class 
    ProcessResearchSpec.SynthesisConstraints
    Hard acceptance constraints for generated synthesis candidates.

      maximum optimization cases

      public int getMaxSynthesisDepth()
      Gets the maximum operation path depth for graph-based synthesis.
      Returns:
      maximum synthesis depth

    • isEvaluateCandidates

      public boolean isEvaluateCandidates()
      Returns whether generated candidates should be evaluated.
      Returns:
      true if candidates should be simulated and ranked

    • isFeasibilityPruningEnabled

      public boolean isFeasibilityPruningEnabled()
      Returns whether fast feasibility pruning is enabled.
      Returns:
      true if pre-simulation pruning is enabled

    • isIncludeSynthesisLibrary

      public boolean isIncludeSynthesisLibrary()
      Returns whether the built-in synthesis operation library is included.
      Returns:
      true if the generator should add curated synthesis operations

    • isIncludeHeatIntegration

      public boolean isIncludeHeatIntegration()
      Returns whether heat-integration metrics are included.
      Returns:
      true if pinch-analysis metrics are included

    • isIncludeCostEstimate

      public boolean isIncludeCostEstimate()
      Returns whether cost-estimate metrics are included.
      Returns:
      true if cost metrics are included

    • isIncludeEmissionEstimate

      public boolean isIncludeEmissionEstimate()
      Returns whether emissions metrics are included.
      Returns:
      true if emissions metrics are included

    • allowsUnitType

      public boolean allowsUnitType(String unitType)
      Checks whether a unit type is allowed.
      Parameters:
      unitType - unit type to check
      Returns:
      true if allowed or if no explicit allow-list is set
